headline: Coffee Culture
description: Coffee originated in Ethiopia (legend of Kaldi, goats dancing after eating coffee cherries). Spread: Yemen (15th century, first cultivation) → Ottoman Empire → Europe (17th century, coffeehouses: 'penny universities') → Americas (18th+). Species: Arabica (~60%, better flavor) vs. Robusta (hardier, more caffeine). Second most traded commodity after oil.

citation.name: The World Atlas of Coffee (James Hoffmann, 2nd Ed)
